instruction: Walk to the living room on the far side of the counter. Stop next to the end table next to the couch with the bookshelf on your right.

**Summary of my navigation:**
1. Started in the kitchen and initially followed the hallway through the dining room to the formal living room — but a full 360° scan there revealed no bookshelf.
2. Recognized the instruction meant the family room "on the far side of the counter" (the kitchen island), so I backtracked to the kitchen.
3. Walked past the island counter, through the breakfast nook, into the family room — which had a white sectional couch and a large built-in bookshelf wall.
4. Positioned myself next to the dark end table at the end of the couch (with the sculpture on it), with the bookshelf on my right, and issued STOP after 183 actions.
